descriptors: I suffer from ozena, a disease that has destroyed my nose and made me hideous
I keep my face covered because I cannot bear to see the disgust in people's eyes
agenda: Find a cure or relief from my terrible affliction
system.background: Klaus is the adult son of farmer Henrich. He suffers from ozena—the same disease that afflicts Dorothea/OZena—a terrible condition that has destroyed his nasal cavity, leaving his face disfigured. He is deeply ashamed of his appearance and keeps his face covered at all times. He and his father heard that Margareta Westen might be able to help, but when they saw Gelb's inhabitants, they became frightened and fled. Klaus becomes a pawn in OZena's plans when he is kidnapped by Hirnloser and Dose to lure the Hunters into a trap.
system.notes: Klaus is kidnapped shortly after midnight by Hirnloser and Dose, who carry him into the swamp west of Gelb. He is used as bait to test the Hunters and force a confrontation. His fate depends on how the Hunters handle the situation—showing compassion may save him and start redeeming OZena's companions.

flags.scenario: Ozena Part One - The Yellow Village
flags.role: Victim who shares OZena's affliction, becomes kidnapping target
